title: EdgeType Property
description: Sets / gets the type of edge to search for.
notes: Use EdgeType to choose whether to search for a single edge or an edge pair.   An edge pair is two opposing edges.  The coordinate of the pair is the midpoint of the line between the two edge coordinates.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: ArcFinder, ArcInspector, BoxFinder, Contour, CornerFinder, Edge, LineFinder, LineInspector
